name: Natural Twist Turn
preceding_figure_names: Closed Telemark, Hover Telemark, Three Step
following_figure_names: Three Step, Reverse Turn, Change Of Direction, Closed Telemark, Open Telemark and Feather Ending, Open Telemark, Natural Turn, Outside Swivel and Feather Ending, Hover Telemark, Reverse Wave, Top Spin, Outside Swivel (check back after step 3 of Feather Step), Fallaway Reverse and Slip Pivot, Bounce Fallaway with Weave Ending, Natural Weave, Closed Impetus and Feather Finish, Open Impetus
notes:
Lady optional styling: head could change to R during Weave.
Natural Twist Turn with Hover Feather Ending described with specific sway and CBM details.
Natural Twist Turn with Natural Weave Ending includes continuation with 3-8 of Natural Weave and finish BDW.
Natural Twist Turn with Closed Impetus And Feather Finish Ending ends with feather finish after RF brush.
Natural Twist Turn with Open Impetus Ending uses Open Impetus movement and feather finish.

steps.action: Forward step preparing OP L side leading

comments: Don't hesitate to place the RF.

steps.action: To side, RF brushes to LF
steps.footwork: T and IE of T of RF
comments: Don't be hesitant to place the foot.

First, place LF, finish the shape to R (L side very stretched, feel like sitting on L leg, compress, and then change shape) and 2nd part (&), change head shape to L (stretch R side) and compress into L knee.
RF will brush, before pushing off on L leg.
Head styling: starting with head shaped to R, when finishing the S, head is shaped to L.
This is a Hover Feather ending.
